todo.text: [Personal] 📚 Learn: build one beginner Python study sheet on variables, input/output, and simple conditionals; deliverable: markdown lesson in projects/python-learning/ with 5 read-and-predict examples and 3 tiny exercises | Why: Python should be learned like a language: fundamentals first, then reading, guided exercises, and only then practical scripts | Proof: Lesson includes explanations, read-first examples, and beginner exercises Philippe can complete without advanced concepts | Unlocks: Progress toward: Write a simple script with input validation

[Trading] 📝 Draft: prepare a watchlist-first company analysis template for Philippe's followed companies; deliverable: markdown template in projects/company-research/ plus a shortlist request section for named tickers | Why: Understanding company financials is required for informed trading decisions | Proof: Template defines thesis, risks, key metrics, and explicitly requires a named ticker before full analysis | Unlocks: Progress toward: Document 10 trade setups with outcomes

[Other] 🔧 Fix: identify one repetitive personal workflow and propose a small automation with clear input/output; deliverable: markdown spec in projects/automation/ | Why: Reduces repetitive manual work, freeing time for skill-building | Proof: Script executes end-to-end on test input | Unlocks: Progress toward: Write a simple script with input validation

[Personal] 📚 Learn: create one focused Japanese study pack from a single beginner theme; deliverable: markdown lesson in projects/language/ with vocab, readings, and 5 short practice prompts | Why: Spaced repetition with focused vocabulary and pattern practice builds usable language skill | Proof: Deck or exercise set has complete entries and is usable for deliberate practice | Unlocks: Unlocks the next stage of reading and basic output practice

[Career] 📝 Draft: draft 3 Instagram content angles tied to real work Philippe has made or plans to make; deliverable: content-plan markdown with hook, source work, and posting angle | Why: Supports Instagram growth through publishable work or process content tied to Philippe's real practice | Proof: Output ties content ideas to real work Philippe made or will make, with clear posting angle | Unlocks: Advances goal progress measurably

done.text: 🎨 Design: one portfolio case-study draft from existing project; deliverable: 250-400 word markdown in projects/portfolio/case-studies/ | Why: Documents existing work - essential for landing creative roles | Proof: Case-study markdown has problem/approach/result sections | Unlocks: Unlocks job applications and client pitches

🎨 Creative MVP: Create one 10-second motion design loop for Instagram; deliverable: MP4 in projects/creative-practice/ plus a 3-line caption draft | Why: Builds visible motion-design proof and supports audience growth goals | Proof: MP4 exported and caption saved in markdown
